search_parameters.q: For Kumaraguru College of Technology in India (Coimbatore), search the official website, graduate programs directory, and course listings to find postgraduate degree programs (Master's/M.Tech/M.A./M.Sc./MBA programs offered). Include program names like 'Master of Science in Computer Science', 'M.Tech in Engineering', 'Master's in Economics', etc. You can also infer programs based on faculty/departments listed on their site. Return valid JSON with this format: { "pg_programs": ["program1", "program2", ...], "total_count": number, "source": "url or 'inferred from departments'" }. Return an empty array if genuinely no data is available.
